item.title: 专栏：从 K-Semiconductor 到 AI 超级大国——韩国如何实现下一次芯片飞跃
item.summary: South Korean President Lee Jae-myung unveiled the country's Three Mega Projects for AI and Semiconductors in late June 2026, an ambitious national strategy designed to strengthen South Korea's global leadership in artificial intelligence and semiconductors. The initiative centers on three pillars—semiconductors, physic
